note: First tap selects the tray item and enters HoldingItem.
Second tap rotates the selected shape through data-driven occupied offsets.
Drag over the board produces a ghost preview and does not commit.
Release keeps the ghost visible and locked without mutating receiver placement.
Clicking the locked ghost is the only sample path that commits placement.
Out-of-grid preview stays invalid, shows red feedback, and cannot lock or commit.
Cancel button clears the active preview without writing placement state.
Single-cell shapes are data-detected as non-rotating and return a light hint.
